email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van E-commerce Specialist bij Danone Belgium. Uw oproep voor een dynamische teamplayer die online aanwezigheid en verkoop stimuleert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, optimaliseer ik productcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik heb ervaring met het creëren van hoogwaardige content, het verbeteren van zoekzichtbaarheid en het analyseren van prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush. Mijn project mirook.com toont mijn vermogen om gestructureerde data en SEO/GEO toe te passen voor betere vindbaarheid.

Ik ben leergierig, proactief en werk graag samen met teams om resultaten te behalen. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief. Ik ben beschikbaar voor een fulltime stage van 6 maanden.

Ik kijk ernaar uit mijn bijdrage te leveren aan Danone's e-commerce successen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the E-commerce Specialist position at Danone Belgium. Your call for a dynamic team player who drives online presence and sales aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, optimize product content, and manage WordPress sites. I have experience creating high-quality content, improving search visibility, and analyzing performance with tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. My project mirook.com demonstrates my ability to apply structured data and SEO/GEO for better discoverability.

I am eager to learn, proactive, and enjoy collaborating with teams to achieve results. My B1 Dutch is improving actively. I am available for a full-time internship of 6 months.

I look forward to contributing to Danone's e-commerce successes.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Met veel motivatie reageer ik op de vacature voor E-commerce Specialist bij Danone Belgium. Uw focus op contentkwaliteit, online search (SEO) en activaties sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring als junior digital marketer met een technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en SEO.

In mijn huidige functie bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk dagelijks met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Google Search Console om prestaties te monitoren en te optimaliseren. Deze ervaring is direct relevant voor het ondersteunen van e-commerce projecten, het waarborgen van datakwaliteit en het verbeteren van online vindbaarheid.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit sluit aan bij uw behoefte aan een analytische en creatieve denker die online activaties kan optimaliseren.

Ik ben proactief, leergierig en werk graag samen met multidisciplinaire teams. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief via cursussen. Ik ben beschikbaar voor een fulltime stage van 6 maanden en gemotiveerd om bij te dragen aan Danone's ambitie om de beste online ervaring in België te bieden.

Ik hoop mijn vaardigheden en enthousiasme in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear selection committee,

I am very motivated to apply for the E-commerce Specialist position at Danone Belgium. Your focus on content quality, online search (SEO), and activations aligns perfectly with my experience as a junior digital marketer with a technical background in web development and SEO.

In my current role at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work daily with tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console to monitor and optimize performance. This experience is directly relevant to supporting e-commerce projects, ensuring data quality, and improving online discoverability.

Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data (JSON-LD schema) and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This aligns with your need for an analytical and creative thinker who can optimize online activations.

I am proactive, eager to learn, and enjoy collaborating with multidisciplinary teams. My B1 Dutch is improving actively through courses. I am available for a full-time internship of 6 months and motivated to contribute to Danone's ambition to provide the best online experience in Belgium.

I hope to further discuss my skills and enthusiasm in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO and content optimization experience (Episto) directly applicable to improving online search and product visibility.
- Hands-on with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs) for performance tracking and KPI improvement.
- Built and managed WordPress sites with structured data and GEO techniques (mirook.com), demonstrating technical e-commerce content skills.
- Proactive and analytical mindset, comfortable with data-driven decision making and cross-functional collaboration.
- B1 Dutch and improving; based in Zwijndrecht near Antwerp, available full-time for 6 months.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO, content creation, and website management. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com), I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve search visibility. Skilled in analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs) and comfortable with e-commerce content management and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & content: on-page SEO, keyword research, SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Web & CMS: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Structured data & GEO: JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
